/usr/bin/cc  -Wno-gnu-statement-expression  -Wl,--no-as-needed CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/mot_commu_ipc.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/mot_leader.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/mot_master.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/mot_master_chassis.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/mot_master_magic.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/mot_master_serial.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/share/mot_ctl.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/share/mot_share_daemon.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/share/mot_share_ipc.c.o  -o leader  -L/opt/etherlab/lib -lethercat -lpthread -lrt -lm
